arts.ttl: Lionel Messi can’t have expected to face this Real Madrid Clásico rival again
arts.sum: Monterrey’s Rayados have officially signed Sergio Ramos, adding a world‐class player to their formidable squad — one whose enviable resume includes multiple club titles, crowned by two Euros and one World Cup. Liga MX has also arranged a reunion with James Rodríguez, who arrived at León at the start of the season, although this time they will face off as opponents.

arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid have seen their first contract renewal offer to star attacker Vinícius Jr. knocked back by the player and his entourage. That’s according to Real insider…
